title: Create a request span for async work
scenario: A span carries context shared by multiple events. Request-scoped fields should not be rebuilt by every call site.
instructions: Implement request_span(request_id, path) -> tracing::Span with tracing::info_span!. Name it "http.request" and record request_id and path fields so async work can enter or instrument the span.

hints.body: Spans represent work with a beginning and end.
Return the Span so callers can enter it or instrument a future.
Keep request context on the span instead of repeating it in every message.

completionExplanation: Request-scoped context can now propagate through synchronous or asynchronous work with a real tracing span.
